parkitect.name: Parkitect
parkitect.description: Ported to next-gen consoles with adapted controller support, including a custom radial menu and a new effects editor for managing park events in real time.

page.title: Parkitect
page.subtitle: Porting
page.shortDescription: Ported to next-gen consoles with adapted controller support, including a custom radial menu and a new effects editor for managing park events in real time.
page.longDescription: Parkitect is a theme park management game where players build and manage their own amusement parks. I ported the game to next-gen consoles, adapting the controls for use with a gamepad through a custom radial menu. I also created the in-game tutorial and developed an effects editor for a DLC, allowing players to coordinate real-time park events, similar to a video editor.

everhood.name: Everhood: Eternity edition
everhood.description: Ported to next-gen consoles with adapted controller support, including a custom radial menu and a new effects editor for managing park events in real time.

page.title: Everhood
page.subtitle: Eternity edition
page.shortDescription: Ported to next-gen consoles with adapted controller support, including a custom radial menu and a new effects editor for managing park events in real time.
page.longDescription: Everhood is a unique musical adventure game set in a strange and colorful world. For the console release, I handled the porting process, adapting the game for next-gen systems. This included creating new menus to integrate the additional content of the 'Eternity Edition', as well as adding new levels and implementing a ranking system. In addition to these features, I also worked on the usual porting tasks such as optimizing controls, adapting the save system, and ensuring compatibility with console achievements.

pirates.name: Pirates outlaws
pirates.description: Ported to next-gen consoles, adapting controls and save systems for a smooth sailing experience.

page.title: Pirates outlaws
page.subtitle: Sailing into new waters on next-gen consoles.
page.shortDescription: Ported to next-gen consoles, adapting controls and save systems for a smooth sailing experience.
page.longDescription: Pirates Outlaws is a strategic card game where players explore seas, fight enemies, and build powerful decks. I was responsible for porting the game to next-generation consoles, adapting the controls for gamepads, integrating a console-specific save system, and ensuring compatibility with achievements. The process also involved performance optimization to maintain smooth gameplay on new hardware.

peglin.name: Peglin
peglin.description: Peglin a roguelike game with peggle-inspired mechanics, now avaliable in Nintendo Switch

page.title: Peglin
page.shortDescription: Experience Peglin, a roguelike game with peggle-inspired mechanics, now optimized for next-gen consoles with enhanced controls, save systems, and achievements.
page.longDescription: Peglin combines roguelike gameplay with peggle-inspired mechanics, offering a unique pinball-like battle experience. For its console debut, I adapted the game for next-gen systems, refining controls for gamepads, implementing a save system, and integrating console achievements. Performance optimization ensured a seamless transition and smooth gameplay on new hardware.

vagante.name: Vagante
vagante.description: Ported Vagante, a roguelike dungeon crawler with challenging procedurally generated dungeons, to next-gen consoles. Enhanced for gamepads, optimized save systems, and integrated achievements.

page.title: Vagante
page.shortDescription: Ported Vagante, a roguelike dungeon crawler with challenging procedurally generated dungeons, to next-gen consoles. Enhanced for gamepads, optimized save systems, and integrated achievements.
page.longDescription: Vagante is a roguelike dungeon crawler where players explore procedurally generated dungeons and battle enemies. For the console release, I managed the porting process, which involved adapting controls for gamepads, integrating a save system, and adding support for console achievements.

slipstream.name: Slipstream
slipstream.description: Slipstream is a retro-inspired racing game, now optimized for next-gen consoles with enhanced controls, save systems, and achievements.

page.title: Slipstream
page.shortDescription: Slipstream is a retro-inspired racing game, now optimized for next-gen consoles with enhanced controls, save systems, and achievements.
page.longDescription: Slipstream is a retro-inspired racing game that captures the essence of classic arcade racing. For its console release, I managed the porting process, including adapting controls for gamepads, integrating a save system, and adding support for console achievements. Performance optimization ensured a smooth and enjoyable racing experience on new hardware.

fightnrage.name: Fight 'n Rage
fightnrage.description: Experience Fight 'n Rage, a classic beat 'em up game, now optimized for next-gen consoles with improved controls, save systems, and achievements.

page.title: Fight ´n Rage
page.shortDescription: Experience Fight 'n Rage, a classic beat 'em up game, now optimized for next-gen consoles with improved controls, save systems, and achievements.
page.longDescription: Fight 'n Rage is a classic beat 'em up game that brings back the arcade action with modern flair. For the console version, I handled the porting process, which included adapting controls for gamepads, integrating a save system, and adding support for console achievements. Performance optimization was also implemented to ensure smooth and responsive gameplay on new hardware.

hammerwatch.name: Hammerwatch
hammerwatch.description: Conquer Hammerwatch, a dungeon crawler with retro aesthetics, now enhanced for next-gen consoles with refined controls, save systems, and achievements.

page.title: Hammerwatch
page.shortDescription: Conquer Hammerwatch, a dungeon crawler with retro aesthetics, now enhanced for next-gen consoles with refined controls, save systems, and achievements.
page.longDescription: Hammerwatch is a dungeon crawler with a classic retro style that challenges players with its action-packed gameplay. For its console release, I managed the porting process, which involved adapting controls for gamepads, integrating a save system, and adding support for console achievements. Additionally, performance optimization ensured a smooth gaming experience on next-gen hardware.

thejourneydown.name: The Journey Down
thejourneydown.description: Embark on The Journey Down, a narrative-driven adventure game, now optimized for next-gen consoles with improved controls, save systems, and achievements.

page.title: The Journey Down
page.subtitle: Step by step
page.shortDescription: Embark on The Journey Down, a narrative-driven adventure game, now optimized for next-gen consoles with improved controls, save systems, and achievements.
page.longDescription: The Journey Down is a narrative-driven adventure game that takes players on a captivating journey with its rich storytelling and immersive gameplay. For its console release, I handled the porting process, which included adapting controls for gamepads, integrating a save system, and adding support for console achievements. Performance optimization ensured a seamless and engaging experience on next-gen hardware.

shy.name: Shy Engine
shy.description: A visualizer developed in Processing (Java) that progressively demonstrates common sorting algorithms like bubble sort, quicksort, and more.

page.title: Shy Engine
page.subtitle: Don't be shy, start your game.
page.shortDescription: A game engine with an integrated editor, developed in C++ using SDL. It features a custom visual scripting language, scene editor, file explorer, and game export capabilities.
page.longDescription: Shy Engine is a full-featured game engine built in C++ using SDL, designed to streamline game development. It includes an integrated editor with a custom visual scripting language, a scene editor, file explorer, and output console. With the ability to compile and export games directly from the engine, developers have all the tools they need to create and package their projects in one place, making Shy Engine a versatile and powerful solution for game creators.

Love.name: Love Engine
Love.description: Love Engine is a versatile 3D game engine with Lua scripting support, built in C++ using a variety of libraries.

page.title: LOVE
page.subtitle: For games made with love
page.shortDescription: Love Engine is a versatile 3D game engine with Lua scripting support, built in C++ with powerful libraries for 2D and 3D rendering, physics, and sound.
page.longDescription: Love Engine is a flexible 3D game engine built in C++ for both 2D and 3D rendering. It uses a component-based architecture, allowing developers to manage and expand functionalities easily. With Lua scripting support, it enables quick customization and prototyping. Powered by libraries like Bullet for physics, SDL for input, FMOD for audio, and OpenGL for rendering, it offers robust tools for creating interactive and dynamic game worlds.

card.name: Untitled game
card.description: A card game in development where players build their own decks and use time manipulation mechanics to outsmart opponents in one-on-one battles.

page.title: Untitled game
page.shortDescription: A card game in development where players build their own decks and use time manipulation mechanics to outsmart opponents in one-on-one battles.
page.longDescription: This game is a unique take on the deck-building genre, where players must think ahead and anticipate their opponent's moves. Using time manipulation mechanics, players can preview and alter their rival’s card plays, adding a strategic layer to traditional one-on-one combat.

Mimi.name: MIMI
Mimi.description: MIMI es un tranquilo juego de simulación dónde puedes decorar tu casa a medida que avanzas en la historia.

page.title: MIMI
page.shortDescription: A cozy simulation game developed in Unity, where players build, customize their home, and care for pets. In the game, you progress through a visual novel-style story with various mini-games.
page.longDescription: MIMI is a cozy simulation game developed in Unity, where players can build and personalize their homes, decorate them, and care for adorable pets. The game features a rich visual novel-style story with engaging mini-games that unfold as players progress. Immerse yourself in a charming world where you create your dream home and enjoy a variety of activities that enhance the cozy experience.

DOME.name: DOME
DOME.description: A 2D side-scrolling survival game made in c++ where the player explore diverse locations, craft weapons, and battle mutants while managing resources to survive the night.

page.title: DOME
page.subtitle: Survive the night, loot the day.
page.shortDescription: A 2D side-scrolling survival game made in c++ where the player explore diverse locations, craft weapons, and battle mutants while managing resources to survive the night.
page.longDescription: DOME is a 2D side-scrolling survival game developed in C++ using SDL. Players explore diverse locations, from hospitals to nuclear plants, while scavenging resources and crafting weapons to survive. The ultimate goal is to rebuild their ship and escape the hostile planet. With a custom component-based architecture, the game challenges players to balance exploration, resource management, and combat as they face mutant enemies and the ticking clock of nightfall.

GungCho.name: Gung Cho'
GungCho.description: A vertical platformer made in Unity where players use a grappling hook to scale mountains, mastering momentum and precision through challenging levels.

page.title: Gung Cho'
page.subtitle: Hook your way to the top.
page.shortDescription: A vertical platformer made in Unity where players use a grappling hook to scale mountains, mastering momentum and precision through challenging levels.
page.longDescription: Gung Cho' is a vertical platformer developed in Unity, where players use a grappling hook to climb challenging mountains. The game emphasizes precision and momentum as players shoot the hook at walls to propel themselves upwards. Although there are enemies, the main focus is on navigating intricate platforming challenges across multiple levels. The objective is to master the hook mechanics and complete all levels to reach the mountain’s peak.

KingRise.name: King Rise
KingRise.description: A browser-based game developed with Phaser where players manage a tribe, build structures, and defend against rival attacks in a top-down 2D world.

page.title: King Rise
page.subtitle: Shape your tribe’s fate
page.shortDescription: A browser-based game developed with Phaser where players manage a tribe, build structures, and defend against rival attacks in a top-down 2D world.
page.longDescription: King Rise is a browser-based game developed with Phaser where players manage a tribe, build various structures, and defend their village from attacks by rival tribes. With a top-down 2D perspective, the game emphasizes strategic resource management and construction. Players must plan and expand their village while protecting it from external threats to ensure the tribe's survival and prosperity.

CTH.name: Crunch Through Hell
CTH.description: A 3D boss rush game developed using the LOVE engine, showcasing the engine's capabilities with Lua scripting, where players defeat bosses and collect gold to enhance their stats.

page.title: Crunch Through Hell
page.shortDescription: A 3D boss rush game developed using the LOVE engine, showcasing the engine's capabilities with Lua scripting, where players defeat bosses and collect gold to enhance their stats.
page.longDescription: Crunch Through Hell is a 3D boss rush game developed using the LOVE engine, featuring Lua scripting to demonstrate the engine’s capabilities. In this game, players face off against challenging bosses and collect gold to improve their stats for tougher battles ahead. The primary focus is on showcasing the engine’s features through intense combat and progression mechanics.

mack.name: Mack_dating_sim.exe
mack.description: An escape room game created for a game jam, where players navigate through a computer, searching for clues and using quirky apps like a truck dating simulator.

page.title: Mack dating sim.exe
page.shortDescription: An escape room game created for a game jam, where players navigate through a computer, searching for clues and using quirky apps like a truck dating simulator.
page.longDescription: mack_dating_sim.exe is an escape room game developed for a game jam, where players must find clues within a computer interface. As they explore documents and use various applications, including a unique truck dating simulator, they piece together information to solve the puzzle. With its creative use of digital environments and quirky mechanics, the game challenges players to think outside the box as they unravel the mystery hidden in the files.

ClimbTetris.name: Climb the tetris
ClimbTetris.description: A local cooperative game developed in Unity for a game jam, where one player controls falling Tetris pieces and the other climbs them, working together to reach the highest point possible.

page.title: Climb the tetris
page.shortDescription: A local cooperative game developed in Unity for a game jam, where one player controls falling Tetris pieces and the other climbs them, working together to reach the highest point possible.
page.longDescription: Climb the Tetris is a local cooperative game created in Unity for a game jam themed around ascent. One player controls falling Tetris pieces while the other climbs them. The game features unique hand-drawn art, with all visuals crafted on paper. Players must work together to climb as high as possible, combining teamwork with the challenge of managing the Tetris pieces and navigating the climbing character. The game emphasizes cooperation and coordination in a competitive setting.

talleres.name: Talleres Paula
talleres.description: A fast-paced cooperative game made for a game jam, where players act as a Formula 1 pit crew, working together to service cars under pressure.

page.title: Talleres Paula
page.shortDescription: A fast-paced cooperative game made for a game jam, where players act as a Formula 1 pit crew, working together to service cars under pressure.
page.longDescription: Talleres Paula is a cooperative game created for a game jam, inspired by the hectic teamwork of pit crews in Formula 1. Players must collaborate to change tires, replace oil, and carry out repairs on racing cars as efficiently as possible. The game challenges coordination and communication, requiring players to strategize and execute tasks under pressure, all while working together to ensure the car gets back on the track.

pope.name: Pope's driver
pope.description: An arcade racing game developed for a game jam, where you play as the Pope's personal driver, racing against the clock to transport him to various locations while advancing through a visual novel-style story.

page.title: Pope's driver
page.shortDescription: An arcade racing game developed for a game jam, where you play as the Pope's personal driver, racing against the clock to transport him to various locations while advancing through a visual novel-style story.
page.longDescription: Pope's Driver is an arcade racing game created for a game jam, where you take on the role of the Pope's personal chauffeur. The goal is to navigate through a series of missions, transporting the Pope to different locations before time runs out. The game combines fast-paced racing with a narrative told through visual novel-style storytelling, adding depth and context to each mission as you advance through the story.

Tellstones.name: Tellstones
Tellstones.description: A multiplayer turn-based memory game developed in C++ with SDL for Linux, featuring online play through a TCP server where players compete to test their memory skills.

page.title: Tellstones
page.subtitle: Outsmart your opponent, one turn at a time.
page.shortDescription: A multiplayer turn-based memory game developed in C++ with SDL for Linux, featuring online play through a TCP server where players compete to test their memory skills.
page.longDescription: Tellstones is a multiplayer turn-based memory game developed in C++ with SDL for Linux, featuring online play via a TCP server. Players compete to test their memory by flipping and repositioning tiles. Each turn, players ask about face-down tiles, scoring points for correct answers and allowing their opponent to score on mistakes. The first to reach three points wins. The game focuses on online competition and memory skills.

Mimigram.name: Nonogram
Mimigram.description: A nonogram puzzle game developed in Unity, where players solve grid-based puzzles by filling in cells to reveal hidden images.

page.title: Mimigram
page.subtitle: Logic meets art
page.shortDescription: A nonogram puzzle game developed in Unity, where players solve grid-based puzzles by filling in cells to reveal hidden images.
page.longDescription: Mimigram is a grid-based puzzle game developed in Unity. Players solve nonogram puzzles by filling in cells based on numerical clues to reveal hidden pictures. The game offers a variety of puzzles, challenging players to use logic and deduction to complete each grid. With an intuitive interface and engaging gameplay, it provides a classic nonogram experience for puzzle enthusiasts.

snake.name: Snake
snake.description: A classic Snake game developed in Processing (Java), featuring the timeless gameplay of guiding the snake to grow while avoiding collisions.

page.title: Snake
page.shortDescription: A classic Snake game developed in Processing (Java), featuring the timeless gameplay of guiding the snake to grow while avoiding collisions.
page.longDescription: Snake Classic is a nostalgic Snake game created using Processing (Java). Players navigate the snake to eat food and grow longer, all while avoiding collisions with walls and the snake's own tail. The game captures the essence of the original Snake experience with straightforward controls and progressively increasing difficulty. Perfect for fans of classic arcade games and simple, addictive gameplay.

tetris.name: Tetris
tetris.description: A classic Tetris game built in Processing (Java), featuring the iconic falling block puzzle gameplay.

page.title: Tetris
page.shortDescription: A classic Tetris game built in Processing (Java), featuring the iconic falling block puzzle gameplay.
page.longDescription: Tetris is a timeless block-stacking puzzle game developed in Processing (Java). Players must strategically rotate and place falling tetrominoes to clear lines and prevent the blocks from stacking up to the top. With its familiar mechanics and addictive gameplay, this version brings the classic challenge to a new platform, offering an enjoyable experience for both new players and Tetris veterans alike.

Wordle.name: Wordle
Wordle.description: A browser-based Wordle game developed in JavaScript, where players guess words based on letter feedback to find the hidden word.

page.title: Wordle
page.shortDescription: A browser-based Wordle game developed in JavaScript, where players guess words based on letter feedback to find the hidden word.
page.longDescription: This is a Wordle implementation in javascript for browser. Players must guess a hidden word by entering guesses and receiving feedback on the letters. Each attempt provides clues about which letters are correct and their positions. The goal is to find the hidden word within a limited number of guesses. With an intuitive interface and engaging gameplay, it offers a fun and challenging experience for word game enthusiasts.

nQueen.name: N Queens
nQueen.description: An implementation of the n-Queens algorithm in Unity, solving the classic chess puzzle with interactive visualizations.

page.title: N Queens
page.shortDescription: An implementation of the n-Queens algorithm in Unity, solving the classic chess puzzle with interactive visualizations.
page.longDescription: This is an interactive implementation of the n-Queens algorithm developed in Unity. The puzzle challenges players to place n queens on an n×n chessboard so that no two queens threaten each other. This version brings the algorithm to life with visual representations, allowing users to watch the solution unfold as they explore the logic behind the classic problem. It combines the elegance of algorithmic problem-solving with Unity’s interactive capabilities for a unique educational experience.

sort.name: Sorting Algorithms
sort.description: A visualizer developed in Processing (Java) that progressively demonstrates common sorting algorithms like bubble sort, quicksort, and more.

page.title: Sorting Algorithms
page.subtitle: Step by step
page.shortDescription: A visualizer developed in Processing (Java) that progressively demonstrates common sorting algorithms like bubble sort, quicksort, and more.
page.longDescription: Sorting Visualizer is a Processing (Java) project that visually demonstrates how common sorting algorithms work, including bubble sort, quicksort, and merge sort. Unlike traditional visualizations, this tool shows the sorting process progressively, allowing users to watch as elements are sorted step by step in real-time. It offers an engaging way to understand the inner workings of sorting algorithms, making it a valuable resource for both students and enthusiasts of computer science.
